label_source: Hand-authored engineering regression labels; not independently adjudicated research labels.

cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false

SELECT COUNT_IF(p.status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events p WHERE p.event_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND 'production' = p.environment AND NOT p.is_test_account

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', event_time) AS event_hour, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate, COUNT(*) AS total_attempts FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false GROUP BY event_hour ORDER BY total_attempts DESC

WITH governed AS (SELECT event_time, status FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false) SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', event_time) AS event_hour, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM governed GROUP BY event_hour

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00'), 0) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failure' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account IS FALSE

SELECT failure_reason, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false GROUP BY failure_reason

WITH governed AS (SELECT nonexistent_source_column AS segment, event_time, status FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false) SELECT segment, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM governed GROUP BY segment

SELECT customer_email, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false GROUP BY customer_email

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production'

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND is_test_account = false

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE processing_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND processing_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success')::DOUBLE / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failure')::DOUBLE / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success'), 0) AS failure_rate FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00' AND environment = 'production' AND is_test_account = false
DELETE FROM payment_events WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00'

SELECT 'status = failure, COUNT(*), environment = production, is_test_account = false' AS claimed_metric FROM payment_events WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 14:00:00' AND event_time < TIMESTAMP '2026-07-07 20:00:00'
